query: What are our project notes saying?
answer:
Based on the notes in your workspace, here's what they're saying:

*   A **recap of the Sprint 1 kickoff** [note:chat:9] highlights several blockers:
    *   The accessibility audit is blocked until the `FeatureGrid` PR lands.
    *   The roadmap proposal will slip if synthesis work is not completed by the end of Sprint 1.
    *   The pricing component design is waiting for marketing to confirm tier copy.

*   A note on **customer interview synthesis methodology** [note:task:11] documents the team's approach to ensure consistent and high-quality output for future synthesis rounds.

*   A personal note titled **"Welcome to your demo workspace"** [note:personal:27] provides a brief introduction to the app's features.

matches.title: Sprint 1 kickoff recap
matches.snippet:
<workspace_content>
📝 Standup recap — Sprint 1 kickoff — Captured from the team standup chat. Posting here so the decisions and blockers are easy to find later without re-reading the whole thread.
</workspace_content>

chunks.text:
<workspace_content>
Sprint 1 kickoff recap
📝 Standup recap — Sprint 1 kickoff
Captured from the team standup chat. Posting here so the decisions and blockers are easy to find later without re-reading the whole thread.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Sprint 1 kickoff recap
🚧 Blockers and risks
Dan can't start the a11y audit until the FeatureGrid PR lands. Watch for delay.
Synthesis is on the critical path for the roadmap proposal. If it slips past end of Sprint 1, the proposal slips too.
Pricing component design is gated on marketing's tier-copy confirmation by Thursday.
</workspace_content>

matches.title: Welcome to your demo workspace
matches.snippet:
<workspace_content>
👋 Welcome to your demo workspace — This is a fully populated example of how the app looks in practice — two projects, a milestone each, real tasks with sub-tasks, threaded chats, and a few hand-written notes. Everything here is searchable.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Welcome to your demo workspace
🧭 Where to start
Hit Cmd-K (or Ctrl-K on Windows / Linux) to open Spotlight — the AI assistant searches every chat, task, and note in this workspace.
Open the Tasks tab to see the sprint board, milestones, and the per-task notes feature.
Chat sidebar shows DMs with three bot peers (Alice, Bob, Carol) plus the team's general channel.
</workspace_content>

matches.title: Customer interview synthesis methodology
matches.snippet:
<workspace_content>
📚 Customer interview synthesis — methodology — Documenting the approach so future synthesis rounds reproduce it. Took two iterations last quarter to land on this; the cost is upfront but the output quality is meaningfully higher.
</workspace_content>
